title: WHITE BIRD DENTAL CLINIC - 211info
text: WHITE BIRD DENTAL CLINIC WHITE BIRD DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers preventive, emergency, and restorative dental care. Partners with the Arizona School of Oral Medicine, Oregon Health and Science University, and Lane Community College. Services include fillings, crowns, endodontics, extractions, periodontics, bridges, prophylaxis, fluoride and sealant applications, and oral health education. Also provides dental services for students in the Bethel school district. 1415 Pearl Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Low-income households, uninsured patients and underinsured patients. No one will not be turned away for inability to pay. Hours: Clinic hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Urgent care clinics: Monday/Wednesday 7:30am-noon, first come, first served Bethel school services: One Friday a month Email (541) 344-8302 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-8302 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: New patients: Call for appointment or email for more information; please allow 48-72 hours for a response via email Urgent care clinics: Walk in Bethel schools: Call for information about Bethel Friday Clinics FEES: Dental Services: Sliding scale fee based on household income for uninsured patients. Accepts OHP, and private insurance. Bethel schools: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of insurance, photo ID, proof of income in apply for sliding scale LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Restoration Emergency Dental Care Pediatric Dentistry If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
